title: Unofficial Clockwork Pack
description: A modpack with the clockwork mod, and optimization mods.
body:
A basic modpack with the main mods being: Clockwork, Create, valkyrien skies and some optimization mods.

The valkyrien skies mod adds physics.

Create mod adds cool contraptions you can make.

And clockwork adds propellers and stuff.

if you find any issues please say it here [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Malte2012/Unofficial-Clockpack/issues).

![fish that spinning](https://media.tenor.com/fpnmTKeAVjsAAAAi/fish-spinning.gif)
